description.en: AnXRSpaceobject defining the origin of the target ray and the direction in which it extends. This space is established using the method defined bytargetRayMode.

description.en: AnXRAnchorSetcontaining all anchors still tracked in the frame.

description.en: AXRRigidTransformwhich provides the position and orientation of the pose relative to the baseXRSpace.

description.en: AnXRRigidTransformwhich describes the current position and orientation of the viewpoint in relation to theXRReferenceSpacespecified whengetViewerPose()was called on theXRFramebeing rendered.
